ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the monitoring station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the station */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* Description of the monitoring station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of monitoring station (e.g., weather, glacier) */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Data coverage of the station (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the data point in meters */,
  "days_since_last_reading" INTEGER /* Number of days since the last reading */,
  "smb" REAL /* Surface mass balance (SMB) in meters */,
  "t2m" REAL /* 2-meter temperature (t2m) in degrees Celsius */,
  "sf" REAL /* Snowfall (sf) in meters */,
  "pdd" REAL /* Positive degree days (PDD) in degrees Celsius * days */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original data point */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "aggregation_value" REAL /* Aggregated value */,
  "aggregation_date" TEXT /* Date of the aggregation */,
  "aggregation_period" TEXT /* Period of the aggregation (e.g., day, week, month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "geospatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of geospatial data (e.g., satellite imagery, elevation map) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the geospatial data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the geospatial data */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the data (e.g., point, polygon) */,
  "projection_system" TEXT /* Projection system used for the geospatial data (e.g., WGS84, UTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geospatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version (e.g., changes made) */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., satellite, climate model) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was performed */,
  "integration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the integration (e.g., integration method, issues) */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_integrations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QA check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "qa_type" TEXT /* Type of QA check (e.g., accuracy, consistency) */,
  "qa_result" TEXT /* Result of the QA check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date the QA check was performed */,
  "qa_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the QA check (e.g., issues found, actions taken) */,
  "qa_status" TEXT /* Status of the QA check (e.g., complete, incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL of the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, answer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being shared */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the data point is shared with */,
  "shared_with_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data point is shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was shared */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sharing event */,
  "share_status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing event (e.g., pending, shared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's focus and responsibilities */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "team_department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., member, lead) */,
  "member_status" TEXT /* Status of the team member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point used in the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  "publication_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project's goals and scope */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leading the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data_points" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-data link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the data point is used in the project */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_points_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES data_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_points_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaboration_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaborator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES data_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project Deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "deliverable_name" TEXT /* Name of the deliverable */,
  "deliverable_description" TEXT /* Description of the deliverable */,
  "deliverable_date" TEXT /* Date the deliverable was submitted */,
  "deliverable_status" TEXT /* Status of the deliverable (e.g., submitted, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone was achieved */,
  "milestone_status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., achieved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES data_projects ("project_id")
)
